title: Who is Celestium? Twitch bans pink haired VTuber streamer for hateful conduct as she claims mass reports and fights suspension
summary_full: Celestium, a VTuber known for gaming streams mixed with Christian discussions, was suspended from Twitch on March 11, 2026 for “Hateful Conduct.” The streamer says she still does not know the exact reason. While appealing the decision, she moved her streams to Kick and YouTube. Lawyer Andrew Esquire also criticized Twitch, questioning the platform’s explanation for the ban.
